titleStmt.title: SII 18.381: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 381. (B.K. No. 138 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1200, Bahudhānya, Vais11ākha śu. 15, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1278, May 8, Sunday.

It states that Sāyidēva-[Daṇḍanāyaka] a Brahmin of Vāsishṭha-gōtra constructed a temple and installed therein the deities Rēchēśvara and Varadāni-Tripurushēśvara and made a grant of land for the worship and offerings to the gods. Maṇḍaḷika Mahadēva-Rāṇeya also made a grant of land to the same gods. The gift land was purchased from Śivarās11idēva, the āchārya of the temple of Gōkēśvaradēva.

The first half of the record is in Sanskrit verse. A supplementary record on the second face of the stone registers a grant for the resident priest and also enumerates the qualifications of the person fit to perform worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla staṁbhāya saṁbhavē . śrī mahī
nabhaḥ . līlāvarāharūpasya bṛhaddauṁṣṭrā
ṁkuraṁ babhau dharitrī jalaja svacchanāḷayitaṁsphuṭaṁ raṁgamātaṁga raṁga māsra
yaṁ saṁpadūrjjitarājyaśrīśō labhatē yādavānvayaḥ . tadrājyē varttamānē tu śrīvisvāmitragōtrajaḥ caṁ
dradēvadvijēṁdrōbhūdartthisārtthasuradrumaḥ . tadaṁgajō guṇagrāmagarimā pratimō bhuvi babhau samasta
sāmaṁta ta sāsanaḥ . tuṁgattuṁgaturaṁgaughalaṁghitāvani śrī pu
rṣōttamanāmaka kṣālitaśāsanaḥ vikramākrāṁtabhūcakra mahā hī
suraḥ . pracaṁḍōddaṁḍadōrddaṁḍakhaṁḍitārātimaṁḍalaḥ Āṁdhrādhīsaṁ vijityājau tadrājyaṁ tadvāhinīṁ dadhau . ya
tturaṁgakhura ritāṁbaraṁ dṛṣṭvā gatvā bhānurakarōda . yatpratāpā
gnē lagnē tīrtthēdya mahā satyavatīprutī . sahasta cchu
ranu tatpratāpā sa yēkadā suhṛnmaṁtri mukhyasāmaṁtasaṁyyu
taḥ catvāri yaṁ stitaḥ saṁpatpramōda staḥ samabhavatu
śrīkriṣṇārjunayōriva . ttastu mahaddharmma liṁgapratiṣṭhārtthaṁ sāyidēvō mahāmatiḥ
tatkulajasya yituṁ kṣamaḥ . tatkulējani viprāgrō vāsiṣṭhē tripurāṁtakaḥ yadbrahmatējastara
ṇi janānaṁdakaṁjō baṁdhujanapriyaḥ śrīkaṁṭha vimaḷadhyānadūrīkṛtabhavāṁ
budhiḥ . lalāṭapaṭṭa lāṁcchitaḥ kaṁṭhē vidhṛta sārō gaṇōttamaḥ . tatsūnu ryya
sya bhūśaṇō ripubhīśaṇaḥ śrīmallināthapādābjapūjāracanacaṁcupaḥ . samasta vidyācā turyyakaḷākēḷīvi
śrīsāyidēva n®varaḥ rājatē kṣitimaṁḍalē . nādē vādavivādē śastraśāstrē nijā gamē sāyyāmātyasad®
kaṣkākaṣkau punaḥ punaḥ kaṣkau . catvāri dvivā rākhyapurē tiṣṭaṁ sa yēkadā svayaṁ hi sivasadbhaktibhāvanāpa
ribhāvitaḥ . ṁnyāśca svapituśca sya ca liṁgapratiṣṭāmaka rōtsarvvatōsau savistaraṁ . brāhmaṇē
bhyō tanmahōcchavamālōkya mahādēvō mahīsvaraḥ . Adadhacchāyidēvāya grāmamēkaṁ su
harśitaḥ tatpurē kṣētramēkaṁ ca taḍāgē puppavāṭikāṁ . dēvānāṁ parvvabhō gārtthaṁ tadā nagarasaṁnidhau tataḥ śrī
sāyidēvākhyaḥpurasthān pūjya sarvvataḥ . samastanagarasrēṣṭhanakharādiḥ vaṇiksabhāṁ Aṣṭāpiṣṭān paṁcamaṭhān saṁ
pūjya puramadhyataḥ taddhastē dattavāndharmmaṁ rakṣārtthaṁ ca svayaṁ tadāsarvvadā rājikīyānāṁ Anaṁguli nirīkṣaṇaṁ .
śrīsāyidēvadaṁṇnāyakaru śrīgōkēsvara dēvarācāryya sivarāsidēvara keyalu kudureyakalliṁ paḍuvalu stha
ḷavaṁ krayaṁgoṁḍu yāsthaḷavaṁ . svasti śrī saku 1200 neya bahudhāṁnyasaṁvatsarada vaisākha su 15 yādivārada
lu śrīrēcēsvara śrīvaradāni tripuruśēsvaradēvara pratiṣṭeyaṁ māḍi puravaṁ raciyisi yādēvarugaḷa Aṁgabhōgaraṁga
bhōgakke śrīmaṁḍaḷika mahadēvarāṇeyaru koṁḍiṟivana gaḍiṁbadalli koṭṭa bhūmiya vivara nālvattuṁbāḍadalli yālūra
baṭṭeyiṁ baḍagalu jōisageyiṁ mūḍalu matta mūṟu keṟeyoḷagaṇa paḍuvaṇa keṟe yoḷage hūdōṁṭa ma
tta 4 boṁbaḷadiṁ teṁkalu karusageyi mēre haraḷu matta hēṟuva sāsanadettu 15 horege bhatta so 1 hēṟiṁgele 50
heḍegege hiḍi gāṇaṁprati paḷigeyeṁṇne saṁtheyalu vuppinikara heḍegege sērevuppu puradoḷage māṟidakke
Arddhāya puradoḷage māṁnyada gāṇa 2 puradoḷagaṇa kāruka maggadeṟe sarvvamāṁnya dēviya kaṁmatada bhatta
dēvadhana māṟidaḍaṁ yāyamāṁnya dēviya doḷageṁṇenu māṟida vastuvige yāyasuṁkavilla puradoḷage A
nyāya niputrikavilla nāḍiṁgevu paṭṭaṇakevu Āsatu Ākāṁtuka yēnu huṭṭidaḍevu Arasumaṁneyu Agrāhi
taru paṭṭaṇada halarū sarvvābādhe parihāravāgi purava pālisuvaru . ṟaṭṭageṟeyalu vūriṁ paḍuvalu matta
ru 80 kārakuṟuvadalu matta 6 yālūralu matta 4 haḷḷada baḷiyalu hūdōṁṭa matta 1 voḷageyulu ma
tta 12 taṁbadaḍiyalu matta 14 koṭajiyalu matta 12 dēhūrali matta 4

dēbyā pūjā(ru)rhanaha kṣētra
vāsiya cihnaṁgaḷeṁteṁdaḍe . A
lubdhaḥ satyavādī ca brahmacārī driḍhabra
taḥ sivabhaktaḥ kṣamāyuktaḥ kṣētravāsī
sa vucyatē . prātasnāyī naktabhōjī sapū
jā(ru)rhastapōṁnvitaḥ yētadguṇayka
hīnastu pūjakōpi na cārhati . yiṁ
taha kṣētravāsi dēviya trikālapūje
ya māḍikoṁḍihanu Ātaṁge Asa
nāścyādanava naḍasi varusaṁprati dēvi
ya bhaṁḍāradalli . hoṁnanu koṁ
ḍihanu mūvattugēṇu bāciviḍiya
lu dānaciṁtāmaṇiya ghaḷeyenisuva
Ā ghaḷeyalu guṇḍādēviya bhūmiyo
ḷage ṟaṭṭageṟeyalu yibbaru pūjāriya
rige matta 10 vuttamada maddaḷigaṁge matta 6 madhya
mada maddaḷigaṁge matta 4 purada taḷāṟa kā
haḷe yeraḍāḷinalu naḍavadakke koṭṭa matta
Ātaṁge purada mēṭigoḷage ko 1 manedeṟe
prajeya kayyalu hoṁge ma 2 lekkadalu ye
ttikoṁbanu kayidhāreya maduvege ma 1
hālukūḷiṁge ma 0 . dēviya prasāda
prātaḥkālinadu guṇamaṭhakke madhyāhnakāli
nadu pūjārigaḷige sāyaṁkālinadu
kṣētravāsige laṁgaprasādāṁna taṁdā
laṁga Ātaṁge dēviya bhaṁḍāradali
varusaṁprati 1 cchatrakke kārakuṟu
vadalli koṁḍiṟivana matta 6 taṁbadaḍi
yalu matta 16 Aṁtu brāhmaṇa bhōjanakke
matta 22 jōvisa gōviṁdadēvaṁge Ālū
rali koṁḍiṟivana matta 4
Digital edition of SII 18.381 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
